宇宙中存在著許多不同類型的恆星，其中一種特別的恆星因其獨特的變光特性而聞名。這類恆星的亮度會因為內部物理過程的變化而周期性地增亮或減暗。問題來了，這種因內部脹縮導致亮度變化的恆星稱為什麼？=There are many different types of stars in the universe, but one particular type is known for its unique property of dimming. These stars' brightness periodically brightens and dims due to changes in their internal physical processes. The question is, what is a star called when its brightness varies due to internal expansion and contraction? A:Variable Star
紅巨星=Red Giant
中子星=Neutron Star
變星=Variable Star
白矮星=White Dwarf
當我們觀察夜空中最亮的恆星時，我們實際上是在看到它們過去的樣子，因為光需要時間才能從恆星旅行到地球。這引出了一個有趣的問題：我們看到的是大約多久之前的太陽？=When we look at the brightest stars in the night sky, we're actually seeing them as they appeared in the past, because it takes time for light to travel from the stars to Earth. This raises an interesting question: approximately how long ago are we looking at the Sun? A:8 Minutes
約30秒=About 30 seconds
約24小時=About 24 hours
約8分鐘=About 8 minutes
約1年=About 1 year
宇宙中的恆星是天文學的基本元素，它們的生命週期極為壯觀。當一顆恆星耗盡所有核燃料後，會發生一種壯觀的現象。問題來了，這種恆星死亡時釋放巨大能量的現象叫做什麼？=Stars in the universe are fundamental to astronomy, and their life cycles are truly spectacular. When a star exhausts all of its nuclear fuel, a spectacular phenomenon occurs. The question arises: what is this tremendous energy release during a star's death called? A:Supernova Explosion
黑洞形成=Black Hole Formation
白矮星冷卻=White Dwarf Cooling
超新星爆炸=Supernova Explosion
星雲擴散=Nebula Expansion
在觀察遙遠的宇宙時，我們偶爾會發現一些明亮的光點突然在天空中出現，然後又迅速消失，這些事件通常只持續幾天到幾週。問題來了，這種短暫且明亮的天文現象稱為什麼？=When observing the distant universe, we occasionally find bright points of light suddenly appearing in the sky and then quickly disappearing. These events usually only last for a few days to a few weeks. The question is, what is this short-lived and bright astronomical phenomenon called? A:Supernova
超新星=Supernova
彗星=Comet
恆星閃焰=Stellar Flare
流星=Meteor
在深邃的宇宙中，有一種極其密集且小巧的天體，其質量極大，但體積卻極小，被稱為宇宙中的密集物質之一。問題來了，這種天體的名稱是什麼？=In the vast universe, there is an extremely dense and compact celestial body. Its mass is enormous, but its volume is extremely small. It is known as one of the dense matter in the universe. The question is, what is the name of this celestial body? A:Neutron Star
褐矮星=Brown dwarf
恆星=Star
行星=Planet
在觀察夜空時，我們經常可以看到一系列亮星被連線成各種形狀，這些形狀被稱為星座。其中，有一個星座是由三顆亮星組成一條幾乎直線的模式。問題來了，這個由三顆亮星組成的星座叫做什麼？=When observing the night sky, we often see a series of bright stars connected into various shapes, which are called constellations. Among them, there is a constellation that is composed of three bright stars forming an almost straight line. The question is, what is this constellation composed of three bright stars called? A:Orion's Belt
大熊座=Ursa Major
北斗七星=Big Dipper
獵戶座的腰帶=Orion's Belt
天鵝座=Cygnus
在星座故事中，有一個是以希臘神話中的英雄命名，這位英雄以其力量和勇氣著稱，被賦予了完成十二項艱鉅任務的責任。問題來了，這個以希臘神話英雄命名的星座是什麼？=Among the constellations, one is named after a hero in Greek mythology. This hero, renowned for his strength and courage, was tasked with completing twelve difficult tasks. The question is, what is this constellation named after a Greek mythological hero? A:Herculese
武仙座=Herculese
英仙座=Perseus
獵戶座=Orion
仙王座=Cepheus
在宇宙的探索中，我們發現了許多行星環繞著它們的恆星運行。然而，有一類特殊的行星，它們沒有恆星可以環繞，漂浮在星際空間中。問題來了，這些不繞任何恆星運行的孤獨行星被稱為什麼？=In our exploration of the universe, we've discovered many planets orbiting their stars. However, there's a special type of planet that doesn't have a star to orbit, floating in interstellar space. The question is, what are these lonely planets that don't orbit any star called? A:Rogue Planets
外星行星=Alien planets
流浪行星=Rogue planets

在我們仰望星空時，經常能看到由無數恆星組成的光帶，這是我們銀河系的一部分。這條明亮的光帶有一個特殊的名稱。問題來了，我們稱這條由恆星組成的光帶為什麼？=When we look up at the sky, we often see a band of light made up of countless stars. This is part of our Milky Way galaxy. This bright band of light has a special name. The question is, what do we call this band of stars? A:Galactic Disk

在廣大的宇宙中，有一顆特別的星星，因為它的位置變化極小，幾乎可以被視為夜空中的固定點。這顆星星位於小熊座，並被用作導航。問題來了，這顆被古代航海家用來定位的星星叫什麼名字？=In the vast universe, there's a special star whose position changes so little that it can be considered a practically fixed point in the night sky. This star, located in the constellation Ursa Minor, was used for navigation. The question arises: what was the name of this star used by ancient navigators? A:North Star
太陽=Sun
北極星=North Star

在宇宙中，有時會出現一些亮如星星卻快速移動的光點，為夜空增添了不少神秘與美麗。這些現象通常與地球穿越彗星留下的塵埃帶有關。問題來了，這種因地球穿越彗星遺留塵埃而形成的光點稱為什麼？=Sometimes, in the universe, bright, fast-moving points of light appear, adding a touch of mystery and beauty to the night sky. These phenomena are often associated with Earth passing through dust belts left behind by comets. The question is, what are these points of light formed by Earth passing through dust belts left behind by comets called? A:Meteor
行星光芒=Planetary light
夜空中，有一個星座因其獨特的形狀而被稱為“天上的W”，這個星座由五顆明亮的主星組成，形成了易於識別的W形狀。這個星座與希臘神話中的一位女王有關。問題來了，這個被稱為“天上的W”的星座是什麼？=There's a constellation in the night sky known as the "W in the Sky" for its unique shape. This constellation is composed of five bright main stars, forming an easily recognizable W shape. This constellation is associated with a queen in Greek mythology. So, what is this constellation called the "W in the Sky"? A:Cassiopeia
仙后座=Cassiopeia
天琴座=Lyra
夜空中有一些星座是以神話中的生物命名的。例如，有一個星座是根據希臘神話中一隻金羊的故事而命名，這隻金羊擁有金色的羊毛，能夠飛行。問題來了，這個以神話中的飛行金羊命名的星座是哪一個？=Some constellations in the night sky are named after mythical creatures. For example, one constellation is named after a golden ram in Greek mythology. This ram had golden fleece and could fly. So, which constellation is named after this mythical flying golden ram? A:Aries
天龍座=Draco
白羊座=Aries
在探索宇宙的過程中，我們遇到了許多不同類型的恆星，其中一種特別的恆星以其驚人的亮度和質量讓天文學家十分感興趣。問題來了，這種質量和亮度都遠超太陽的恆星被稱為什麼？=In the process of exploring the universe, we encounter many different types of stars. One particular type of star has attracted great interest from astronomers due to its astonishing brightness and mass. The question is, what is this star, which is much more massive and luminous than the Sun, called? A:Supergiant
超巨星=Supergiant
在研究遙遠星系時，我們常常遇到一種極為強大的能量源，它們能夠發射出強烈的電磁波，甚至能從宇宙的另一端被我們探測到。問題來了，這些強大能量源的名稱是什麼？=When studying distant galaxies, we often encounter extremely powerful energy sources that emit strong electromagnetic waves, even being detected from the other side of the universe. The question is, what are these powerful energy sources called? A:Active Galactic Nucleus

夥伴每升一級，友好度將 +1=Your pet receives +1 amity for each level up
每提升一級，將有 3 點屬性點可分配=You receive 3 attribute points to allocate for each level up

部分夥伴擁有專屬的強化道具，使用後可隨機提升能力值一點=Some partners have special enhancement props, and they can increase their ability value at random after use.
夥伴的友好度若過低，戰鬥中將有機會叛逃=If a pet's amity is too low, it might run away during the battle.
泡溫泉可提升 HP 跟 SP 上限，每一座溫泉可提升各 10 點=Relaxing in hot springs can increase the HP and SP limits by 10 points each.
裝備一旦耐久變 0 將會損壞無法發揮作用\n損壞的裝備可透過修裝回復=Once the durability of an item reaches 0, the damaged item cannot be restored through repair.

任何地方均可能會出現寶箱、木桶之類物品，點選後可拿取裡頭的物品，例如我旁邊的木箱，打破它就可以得到裡面的物品了。=Many articles such as Treasure Box, barrel etc may be found anywhere. Choose and Click any one of them and then take contents in them. For instance, you can break the wooden box beside me and take the items in it.
四處均有許多豐富資源可以撿取，就如我旁邊的椰子樹上，椰子是可以摘取的。=There are many kinds of resources around here to be used. For example, you can pick coconuts from the tree beside me.
如果要離開至其他地方，需乘坐如竹筏，或飛行類的交通工具。交通工具的取得可透過任務取到，或是經由設計圖，進一步合成得到。=To leave for other place, you can take raft or flying vehicles. You can get vehicles by completing missions or by synthesizing designs.

機智問答=3. Q&A
在參加活動之前我說明一下活動規則。=Before the competition, I would like to explain the rule.
玩家進入活動場景後，點選問答主持人即可參加機智問答的活動。每題皆有#R#B六秒/#R/#B的回答時間，若超過六秒即算答錯。而每個玩家若答錯#R#B六次/#R/#B即會被判出局，需購買活動報名卷才能再次進來活動場景，積分也將重新計算。=Click the host to begin the Q&A event.You have #R#Bsix seconds/#R/#B for each question.Over 6 sec, the answer will be invalid. If you're false for #R#Bsix times/#R/#B,you will be kicked. To join the event again registration Voucher is needed.
活動時間請#R#B參閱活動時間列表/#R/#B，時間一到則前二十名的玩家便可獲得活動獎品。若玩家因物品欄滿而無法獲得物品則視同放棄拿取物品，這點請特別注意。=The activity time is from #R#B 7pm-7:30pm Wed./#R/#B and  from #R#B 2pm- 2:30pm Saturday/#R/#B .When time is up,the first 20 players will get rewards for this activity.If your item column is full,you can't get gifts.Attention please.
最後提醒您，雖然本活動玩家可組隊報名及進入活動場景，但是參與活動的只會有隊長，獎品也將只發放給隊長，所以請玩家務必解散隊伍來參加活動。=Although, teams are permitted to join this event, only the team leader can answer the questions, and recieve rewards. So it is better that the players join up individually.

如果我有一個圓形物體想要算出它的面積那我該用那個公式呢？=How do you calculate a circle's area?
半徑乘半徑乘3.14=Radius times radius times 3.14.
半徑乘3.14=Radius times 3.14
半徑乘直徑乘3.14=Diameter times 3.14
那如果我手上有一個菱形物體，想要算出它的面積那我又該用那個公式？=How do you caculate a rhombus's area?
上底加下底乘高除以2=Top Line plus Bottom line times the height divided by two.
上底加下底除以2=Top Line Plus Bottom Line divided by two.
對角線乘對角線除以2=Diagonal times Diagonal divided by two.
那如果我要算出一個橢圓形水池的面積，那我又該用那個公式？=How do you calculate an ellipse's area?
半長軸長乘半短軸長乘3.14=N1*N2*3.14
半長軸長乘半短軸長除3.14=N1*N2/3.14
